title: GraalVM JavaScript Interpreter
summary: GraalVM comes with a JavaScript interpreter which you can use to run JavaScript both from the command line and from inside your Java code. GraalVM also has Node.js + NPM compatible commands you can install - if you want or need that. In this tutorial I explain how to use the GraalVM JavaScript interpreter, and how to install the Node.JS + NPM commands.
content:
GraalVM comes with a JavaScript interpreter which you can use to run JavaScript both from
                the command line and from inside your Java code. GraalVM also has Node.js + NPM compatible commands
                you can install - if you want or need that. In this tutorial I explain how to use the GraalVM
                JavaScript interpreter, and how to install the Node.JS + NPM commands.
